---
path: "/org/topic/subtopic"
title: "My article"
---

Defining components in code cells:

```{python}
import publish_quarto as org
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(
    [[1, 2], [3, 4]],
    columns=["col1", "col2"],
    index=["row1", "row2"],
)
``` 

```{python}
org.create_highchart(
    key="my-highchart",
    title="Highchart title",
    data=df,
    graph_type="line",
)
```

```{python}
org.configure_factbox(
    key="my-factbox",
    title="Factbox title",
    display_type="default",
)
```

Inserting a highchart:

::: { #my-highchart .org }
:::

Inserting a factbox:

::: { #my-factbox .org }
The text of the factbox, written with Markdown inside a fenced div.
:::
